mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM exam WHERE class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT * FROM exam WHERE paper_id = #{paperId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM exam WHERE create_by = #{createBy} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM exam WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam WHERE class_id = #{classId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam (exam_name, paper_id, class_id, start_time, end_time, status, allow_screen_switch, create_by) VALUES (#{examName}, #{paperId}, #{classId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{allowScreenSwitch}, #{createBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam SET exam_name = #{examName}, paper_id = #{paperId}, class_id = #{classId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, allow_screen_switch = #{allowScreenSwitch} WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
